labels.notes: Karen Dawn White 11:03am — cervical radiculopathy + autoimmune (alopecia totalis, MS, lupus-like). Doctor administered injection to right side of neck (clearly stated in Procedure section). DEFECTS: (1) Class E BILLING MISSED INJECTION — only A007A + K005 + Q310 saved. Expected G370A (joint/bursa injection) for the cervical injection. Augment signal table has no `neck injection` / `cervical injection` keyword, so safety net didn't fire. (2) Class H K005A INAPPROPRIATELY ADDED — SOAP has no mental-health primary content (cervical pain + IVIG/MS workup). The PrimaryMentalHealth condition fired without `condition_keyword_guard` coverage for K005. (3) Diagnostic code 724 (Lumbago/sciatica) is in the right family but wrong site — patient has CERVICAL not lumbar radiculopathy. Better: 723 (cervical) or 729 (musculoskeletal), or 335 (motor neuron — given MS context).
